/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -std=c++11 -Wno-write-strings -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libjetson-inference.so -o aarch64/lib/libjetson-inference.so CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/actionNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/backgroundNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/calibration/randInt8Calibrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/depthNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/detectNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/imageNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/modelDownloader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/poseNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/segNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/tensorNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/tracking/objectTracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/tracking/objectTrackerIOU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/tracking/objectTrackerKLT.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/plugins/FlattenConcat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/plugins/pose/trt_pose/parse/connect_parts.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/plugins/pose/trt_pose/parse/find_peaks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/plugins/pose/trt_pose/parse/munkres.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/plugins/pose/trt_pose/parse/paf_score_graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/plugins/pose/trt_pose/parse/refine_peaks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/plugins/pose/trt_pose/parse/test_all.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/jetson-inference_generated_backgroundNet.cu.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/jetson-inference_generated_depthNet.cu.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/jetson-inference_generated_detectNet.cu.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/jetson-inference_generated_segNet.cu.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference.dir/c/jetson-inference_generated_tensorConvert.cu.o   -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -L/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/tegra  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/tegra:/jetson-inference/build/aarch64/lib:/opt/nvidia/vpi2/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu: /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -lpthread -ldl -lrt aarch64/lib/libjetson-utils.so -lnvinfer -lnvinfer_plugin -lnvparsers -lnvonnxparser /usr/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.5.0 /opt/nvidia/vpi2/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvvpi.so.2.1.6 /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -lpthread -ldl -lrt -lGL -lGLU -lGLEW -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgstapp-1.0 -lgstpbutils-1.0 -lgstwebrtc-1.0 -lgstsdp-1.0 -lgstrtspserver-1.0 -ljson-glib-1.0 -lsoup-2.4 /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libnppicc.so -lnvbuf_utils /usr/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_cudev.so.4.5.0
